message:
fix(ci): upgrade zig 0.13.0 to 0.14.0 to fix AccessDenied bug

The AccessDenied error in gozstd compilation is a known zig 0.13.0 bug
(ziglang/zig#20689) fixed by PR #20740. Upgrading to 0.14.0 (released
Jan 30, 2026) resolves the root cause. Keep flock serialization as
defense-in-depth.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew

files.patch:
@@ -37,7 +37,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Install Zig
         uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v2
         with:
-          version: 0.13.0
+          version: 0.14.0
 
       - name: Create zig cross-compilation wrappers
         run: |
